{{Infobox technique
| name = veil
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[veil]] is a technique used by Underlords to hide and contain their power.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[veil]] is a technique that allows one to mask their power.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Veils are a necessary sacred art.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has been working on his veils.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
